title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: A podcast episode examining economic questions about AGI, including optimal taxation and wealth redistribution, how non-AI-leading countries can benefit from AI gains, and whether AI-driven inequality is inevitable. The discussion challenges intuitive assumptions about AI's economic share and labor integration.
